description_long: This is an electric bass guitar with a classic double-cutaway body shape, finished in a glossy green color on the front and back. The body features a white pickguard, two pickups, and a set of control knobs for volume and tone adjustment. The neck is made of a lighter wood, likely maple, and is fitted with a rosewood or similar dark fingerboard with visible fret markers. The headstock is elongated with four tuning pegs arranged in a line, typical of many bass guitars. The bridge and hardware are metallic, providing structural support and string anchoring. The overall design is sleek and ergonomic, suitable for both performance and practice in urban environments.
description: A green electric bass guitar with a double-cutaway body, white pickguard, and four inline tuning pegs. It features metallic hardware and a light wood neck.
description_view_0: Front view showing the green body, white pickguard, pickups, control knobs, and the full length of the neck and headstock.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the slimness of the body and neck, with hardware and strings barely visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid green back of the body and the light wood neck, with no visible electronics or pickguard.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again emphasizing the thinness of the guitar and the contour of the body.
attribute_headstock_design: Elongated headstock with four inline tuning pegs, no visible logo, and a simple contour.
